item.title: I'm in the wrong business
item.description: Aydan Conrad, a Twitch streamer and a Fortnite professional player decided to surprise his mother by paying off all of her remaining student loans. Good on you Aydan!

item.title: My Shadowheart Cosplay from BG3 - YuzuPyon
item.description: Hello everyone :) Today I'd like to share more pics of my Shadowheart Cosplay, last time I posted about my Shadowheart people complained about my selfie mirror videos saying it looks bad and awkward and that I should have a photographer take pictures instead, but I do actually!!! ? so I wanted to share the pics I took with my photographer this time! (his IG for reference : https://instagram.com/neroburn_art he's also an artist!) I think videos are cool too sometimes, shows that I'm a real moving person and not just a static picture haha so I like to post both to show different aspects of my work. And mirror videos also convey a sense of closeness, I enjoy seeing cosplayers mirror selfies cause it feels like real people too! What do you think? :) Pics by Neroburn Wig and hair accessories handmade by me Source: https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Fallout atomic mega dump (part 3)
item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: Feeling hope
item.description: I’m finally leaving a covert narcissist (I’d been tricked into having her last name). My parents disowned me after I got married (not that they cared about me anyway. They just wanted to keep control for themselves). So, I decided to choose a completely new name but was worried because it’s a feminine name. Completely surprised that friends and even strangers in my life have been so supportive. Of course ex is not supportive. I get compliments on my painted nails and everyone has asked my pronouns and how to pronounce my new name. Social security office even asked if I wanted to change my gender marker.
item.dc:creator: MyLittleLily

item.title: Life comes at you fast with a kid around that has not filter
item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: I like dog dumps and I cannot lie
item.dc:creator: caaarrots

item.title: Moving out!
item.description: I’ve often thought about comics on many subjects regarding tough things I went through in my recent life. It’s hard to want to make comics about those things. Yes, on one hand, making comics about traumatic things will allow me to somewhat get my feelings out and maybe even connect to some people with those experiences. Maybe I can even profit off of those things and have some good of it! But sometimes addressing difficult events in my life in detail through my comics (something I do for majorly for fun) feels like it would just be re-traumatising, and in most ways, NOT good for me! I want to address it somewhat, because I can’t pretend bad things didn’t happen and if I don’t bring it up… it just kind of feels like I’m hiding it in a way… Overall I want to move on from it. It makes me feel better knowing that I can choose how all the difficult emotions affect me by moving on and letting it go. Something I learnt from people who hurt me, is that they ALL seemed to never be able to let things go. They always held onto things. Whether it be good or bad memories, they always seemed to cling onto it. It was like they were stuck in a loop and couldn’t move on. I don’t wanna be like that, because holding on and not dropping all the anger and resentment I have could lead me to hurt people I really care about. I want to focus on making brand new memories with the people I love. I want to focus on bettering myself and putting all the effort I could be spending feeling bad for myself into new ways of loving myself. I’m moving out and moving on. Maybe you are going through or you went through something unfair…you can’t change what has happened to you, but all you can do is chose what you do next. For you I hope you are able to let go and move on as well. My comic instagram and p@treon https://www.instagram.com/miaminicomics https://www.patreon.com/miaminicomics Dono and commissions: https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella b00ba accounts: Extra https://www.patreon.com/miaormoa Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: This is not ok! Can we please teach young people that no means no, you don't own another human being, it doesn't matter married or not. No you are not entitled to sex!
item.description: It's scary that this still has to be said. If you're someone who's grown up hearing this shit, please know it's 100% wrong!!!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Fallout TV Memes
item.dc:creator: superanth

item.title: I think it’s time to go
item.description: CPhT since 2008 here. Oldest & most experienced person working in my pharmacy, which is at a regional grocery chain. The younger techs often refer to me as their ‘work mom,’ because I’m their cheerleader and never cop an attitude when they make mistakes or need my help. I love the team I’m currently working with, which is part of why today caught me off guard. We have this one patient, she’s notorious for yelling at the staff. I’ve kinda stuck up for her in the past to my colleagues. I said look she has severe anxiety, I think interacting with us is hard for her. So I usually volunteer to help her. It’s easy when she calls, because her name appears on caller ID. Her daughter, who participates in her care, has had plenty of very normal interactions with me, and is typically who comes to collect her mom’s meds once we have them ready. But today the patient herself came to the pharmacy. I didn’t even recognize her until she told me her name. It’s the first time I’ve ever seen her in person. Things went like they usually do. Right off the bat, she was shouting at me. I was taking too long. Somebody had surely made a mistake with her meds, because ‘none of us know what we’re doing.’ She had already called corporate and spoken to somebody ‘above (my) head’ and now it was ‘time for (me) to get it together’ because ‘(my) people skills is horrible.’ I maintained my composure until she began making accusations of racism, saying she felt unsafe that I was handling her medication; that I might tamper with it to harm her because she’s black and I don’t have any respect for black women. She then told my superiors that unless they fire me, she will be posting video of me on social media, because ‘that girl has no business working with the public.’ I did not shout back at her. She was hollering a threat at me after I gave her the medication, but I simply walked away. A colleague asked if I was ok, to which I responded, “I can’t do this anymore. I will not be helping this patient again.” I was pretty shaken up, because this is one of those really frustrating times that as hard as I try to advocate and be there for my patients, it’s not enough. I can’t fix this situation and I can’t help this person access their treatment. That will always upset me, regardless of whose ‘fault’ it is. I was also upset because I lost my best friend, who happens to have been a black woman, to an act of gun violence last year. And immediately I wanted to call her, and hug her. But she’s gone, so I can’t. We grew up in a tiny town in East Texas, and she was one of like, maybe 12 black people in our entire school. But as soon as we turned 18, we got the hell out of there together, went to the same college, etc. So what happened today hit home for me in a lot of really difficult ways. My boss wasn’t there when this happened, but came in later and asked for details. When I heard that the woman had called our regional director and made claims that I had discriminated against her, I had tears in my eyes. Boss’ response? “You’re a grown woman. Stop crying.” I looked right at her and said, “yes I am a grown woman, and I have a right to be upset. And if you and this company don’t have my back, I’m out of here.” I them got chastised—loudly, in front of everyone— for ‘making a threat.’ Management later contacted the patient and assured her that they don’t condone my behavior, and ‘want to make sure (the patient) is being treated right.’ They did not exercise their right to refuse to serve this patient any longer. I’ve been with this company since 2011. This job helped bring me back to life after I got very sick and had to drop out of medical school halfway. But tonight, I am updating my resume. I’m tired. I’m just so freaking tired.
item.dc:creator: sarabear

item.title: Cat Dump 2: More Meows for You
item.description:
Impossible.
Ojos is the Spanish for eyes. This kitty has no ojos - Nojos!
Me two hours after a gummy.
This cat is a demigod of some sort.
Me too, Cheesecake.
I recommend James the Totally Real Human on Facebook for cat-themed Simpsons memes.
Cat tax: We brought our sunflower out for coffee.
item.dc:creator: Gadhrach

item.title: How to deal with trolls on social media - advice from Spin Doctors
item.description: Do you remember the song “Two Princes” by the Spin Doctors from the early 90s? The lead singer of the group offered advice on how to deal with trolls on social media. Those that fit the description should prepare to be blocked by GenX and Millennial users who love Threads.

item.title: We need Frank more than ever.
item.dc:creator: vodray

item.title: Circuit Board Dress I made won Most Innovative Costume at Neotropolis!
item.description:
The dress weighs 10lbs and has over 10k rhinestones, 500+ mirror tiles, 5 iphones, working lights and Adafruit LEDs, and took over 24hrs of work to make. The monitor on my head is empty inside except for some foam and only weighs 1lb. Honestly the most uncomfortable part of the costume was the shoes and how windy and cold it was!
Winning most innovative at the costume contest!
item.dc:creator: omgchomp

item.title: Bottom shelf memes up for adoption.
item.description:
#adopt_dont_shop
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Posted on my local liquor store's cash register.
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Join for the meme challenges! or maybe check out: twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live! We're playing the hot new game that just dropped. Spanky. Come watch me spank my friends.
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) who we certainly did not buy...or adopt. She was rescued from a tree and decided she was going to live in our house forever.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka
